baseline_guidance: Run each eval with this skill and compare against a no-skill baseline or the previous skill version; pass only when the skilled run better satisfies the assertions without losing required safety or precision.

evals.prompt: Read docs/feature-brief.md, write a /goal-ready PLAN.md for this repo, then publish the implementation issues to GitHub.
evals.expected_output: The agent reads the source document and sibling skill contracts, writes PLAN.md with the required sections and incremental steps, creates an issue manifest, publishes GitHub issues in dependency-safe waves, and reports PLAN.md plus created issue URLs.
assertions: Requires at least one source document path and verifies it exists before planning.
Writes or replaces PLAN.md with the required sections from create-plan-from-doc.
Includes Step 0 for progress and changelog tracking setup.
Breaks work into vertical tracer-bullet issues with waves, blockers, edge types, parallel-safe siblings, coordination risks, and acceptance criteria.
Runs gh auth status and detects the destination repository before publishing.
Uses scripts/publish_github_issues.py or equivalent deterministic gh issue create commands.
Reports created issue URLs grouped by execution wave and identifies same-wave work that can run in parallel.

evals.prompt: Use docs/migration-plan.md to create PLAN.md and issues, but do not publish anything yet.
evals.expected_output: The agent creates the complete PLAN.md and issue manifest, runs only a dry-run publishing preview, and reports the manifest path plus the exact reason publishing was skipped.
assertions: Does not publish GitHub issues when the user asks not to publish.
Still completes PLAN.md instead of stopping after analysis.
Creates a structured issue manifest suitable for later publishing.
Uses the helper's --dry-run mode or clearly equivalent non-writing gh command preview.
Reports assumptions, skipped gates, missing sibling contracts, or GitHub publishing blockers.
